name: Pate Chinois (Shepherd's Pie)
recipeIngredient: 1 to 2 cups cooked leftover beef, chopped,
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the meat fat in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and brown it until softened.
3. Stir in the cooked or raw beef, savory seasoning, salt, and pepper.
4. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
6. Pour the creamed corn evenly over the top of the meat filling.
7. Spread the mashed potatoes on top, creating an even layer.
8. (Optional) Add a small pat of butter on top for extra richness.
9. Smooth the surface with a knife and make decorative designs if desired.
10. Dot the top with small pieces of butter.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
